name: New Skill Proposal

---

## Skill Name

`kebab-case-name`

## What does this skill do?

A clear description of the skill's purpose.

## Who would use it?

Target audience and use cases.

## How does it relate to existing skills?

- Dependencies on other skills: ___
- Complements: ___
- Overlaps with: ___

## Proposed Structure

```
skills/optional/<skill-name>/
├── README.md
├── workflows.md
├── examples.md      (optional)
├── templates.md     (optional)
└── checklist.md     (optional)
```

## Estimated Token Budget

Target: under 20K tokens for the full skill package.

## Additional Context

Links, references, or examples of similar capabilities.
